field9: Monitoring period 01/01/2025-30/06/2025 for Verra VCS 3599 (Grouped Projects for Safe Drinking Water for Schools in Viet Nam), illustrative AMS-III.AV. parameters. BE (field3) and ER (field6) are computed on-chain by calculate_report_fields: SEC=357.48/nwb; BE_y=QPW_y*m*X_boil*SEC*(BL_fuel*f_i*EF_fuel*1e-9); ER_y=BE_y-PE_y-LE_y. With the values below, BE=ER=11084.74 tCO2e. Water-quality gate zeroes ER if appliance pass-rate (field10/field11) < 0.90.
